headerDisplay: HomeBridge plugin for the **Miele Scout RX2** robot vacuum cleaner. Requires a Miele Developer account and registered application to obtain API credentials.
footerDisplay: Visit the [Miele Developer Portal](https://www.miele.com/developer/) to get your Client ID and Client Secret.

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: OAuth2 Client ID from the Miele Developer Portal

clientSecret.title: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: OAuth2 Client Secret from the Miele Developer Portal

country.title: Country
country.description: Your country/locale code (e.g. en-GB, de-DE, en-US)

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the Miele API for device status updates (used only when the real-time event stream is unavailable)

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging
debug.description: Log verbose API and state details to the HomeBridge log

features.title: Features
features.description: Enable or disable each HomeKit service individually. Disabled services are removed from HomeKit on the next restart.

startCleaningSwitch.title: Start Cleaning Switch
startCleaningSwitch.description: Main on/off switch to start and stop cleaning runs. Siri: "turn on/off Scout".

returnToDockSwitch.title: Return to Dock Button
returnToDockSwitch.description: Momentary switch that sends the robot back to its charging base. Siri: "turn on Scout Return to Dock".

pauseSwitch.title: Pause / Resume Switch
pauseSwitch.description: Toggle switch to pause and resume an active cleaning run.

cleaningActiveSensor.title: Cleaning Active Sensor
cleaningActiveSensor.description: Occupancy sensor that triggers HomeKit automations when cleaning starts or finishes.

dockedSensor.title: Docked Sensor
dockedSensor.description: Occupancy sensor that triggers HomeKit automations when the robot returns home.

dustBoxSensor.title: Dust Box Sensor
dustBoxSensor.description: Contact sensor that opens (alerts) when the dust box has been removed.

stuckSensor.title: Stuck / Blocked Sensor
stuckSensor.description: Motion sensor that fires when the robot gets stuck, blocked or lost.

batteryService.title: Battery Service
batteryService.description: Expose battery level, charging state and low-battery warning to HomeKit.
